creator: owen94012@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #7)

Thanks for the tips, I am working with the guys upstream.

I built it with poudriere but I was unsure how to get SVN diff to work in there so I just overwrote the files in a manually created jail then did a svn diff of that.

I'm not sure how to do an svn diff from poudriere after a testport command but that's a different thing.
